title: Cosmic Symphony
description: An abstract depiction of a birthing nebula, featuring deep blues, magentas, and golden stellar dust. Represents the chaotic beauty of creation.
thoughts: I wanted to capture the contrast between the coldness of deep space and the absolute warmth of a newly forming star. The gold leaf accents catch the light beautifully.

title: Beacon of Hope
description: A solitary lighthouse standing tall against a crashing ocean wave under a fiery sunset sky. Symbolizes guidance and resilience in dark times.
thoughts: Blending the warm yellows and deep purples of the sky was a therapeutic experience. The texture of the waves was built up using a palette knife.

title: Celestial Peaks
description: A majestic snow-capped mountain range resting quietly beneath a brilliant swirling Milky Way galaxy. Captures the silence of the wilderness.
thoughts: Gouache allowed me to get those crisp edges on the mountain ridge, contrasted with the soft, blended starry sky behind it. The stars were splattered with a toothbrush.

title: The Silent Observer
description: An astronaut sitting peacefully on the edge of a lunar crater, looking at a glowing, detailed planet Earth floating in the dark void.
thoughts: This piece was inspired by the overview effect. The astronaut's suit is textured with modeling paste, while the background is a flat, deep matte black.

title: Ethereal Whispers
description: Flowing purple and violet ink patterns that mimic cosmic dust clouds and stellar pathways, highlighted by delicate white ink stars.
thoughts: I let the watercolor flow naturally, letting the pigments separate to create organic patterns. It's a study of control versus surrender.

title: Nebula's Heart
description: A circular canvas portraying a deep space portal. The resin finish gives a glassy, three-dimensional depth to the galactic layers underneath.
thoughts: Resin requires quick work and precision, but the deep gloss it creates makes the colors pop. It feels like looking through the window of a spacecraft.
